github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This workspace contains the Reverse Engineer Skill v3.0 — a Python static analysis engine. Entry point: reverse_engineer_skill.py. Engine package: engine/ (loaders, parsers, analyzer, ai_analysis, evaluator, output_manager, pipeline, generators/). Generates 5 output files per run: _sdd.json (13-section SDD), _dashboard.html (6-section Apple-theme HTML), _report.md (11-section Markdown), _evaluation.md (100-pt quality score), manifest.json. Parser return contract: {file, language, classes, methods, imports, dependencies, routes, db_entities}. All outputs go to ./outputs/{repo_name}/ via OutputManager. No new deps — only anthropic in requirements.txt. HTML dashboard uses Apple design (#f5f5f7 bg, #0071e3 blue, SF Pro fonts, 14px border-radius). See COMPONENTS.md for function-by-function reference, SETUP.md for setup guide.
